job_description:
# Data Analyst
Company: Jack
Source: LinkedIn
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 30, 2026, shown as 9 hours ago during direct page check
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4407023543

## Highlights
- Broad Data Analyst role focused on turning data into decision-ready insights.
- Responsibilities include collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data, building dashboards and reports, tracking KPIs, identifying trends, and working cross-functionally.
- Requires SQL and Excel, with BI tools such as Tableau, Looker, or Power BI; Python or R is a plus.
- Strong fit for reporting, stakeholder analytics, data integrity, and dashboarding, but no healthcare/claims domain signal was visible.
strengths: Strong match for SQL, Excel, dashboards, reporting, KPI tracking, stakeholder analytics, and data integrity.

notes: Apply if time after healthcare/payer roles. Tailor toward SQL, Excel, Power BI/reporting, KPI dashboards, stakeholder insights, and data accuracy. Do not imply healthcare domain for this role.
